mapper.select: select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE' and runtype in( 'REGULAR', 'DLM_BATCH') and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE') and not exists(select 1 from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid = a.jobid and status != 'Recovered' and basedate = STR_TO_DATE(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y/%m/%d') ) order by jobid

select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) order by jobid desc

select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cast(version as INTEGER) desc
select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select distinct keymap_id from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) order by keymap_id

select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and status in ( 'ACTIVE', 'NEW') and version = (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid)
order by jobid desc

select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where 1=1 and jobid like 'TESTDATA_AUTO_GEN%' and phase='CHECKIN' and status='ACTIVE' order by jobid
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piijob (jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cronval, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ACTIVE', #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piijob (jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cronval, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ACTIVE', #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piijob set phase= 'APPROVING', upddate= NOW() where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piijob set phase= 'CHECKOUT', upddate= NOW() where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piijob set phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= NOW() where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piijob set phase = CASE WHEN phase = 'CHECKIN' THEN 'CHECKOUT' ELSE 'CHECKIN' END, upddate = NOW() where jobid = #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version = #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piijob set status= 'OLD', phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= NOW() where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version != #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piijob set jobname= #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, system= #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, policy_id= #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jobtype= #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runtype= #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, calendar= #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, time= #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cronval= #{cronval, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmflag= #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_id1= #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_name1= #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_id2= #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_name2= #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_id3= #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_owner_name3= #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW(), upduserid= #{upduserid} where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, cronval, confirmflag, status, phase, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) and status != 'OLD'
order by jobid, jobtype desc, system, policy_id, keymap_id limit #{offset}, #{amount}
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid)
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piijob a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) and a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.jobtype = 'PII'
